Name: FilterManager Page
High Level Logic: Routes selected menu state to FilterManager component

Name: Top Navigation Hook
Purpose: Connect menu selection to page rendering
High Level Logic: Checks selectedMenu equals FilterManager then renders component

Name: FilterManager Main Container
Purpose: Orchestrate filter list and modal workflows
High Level Logic: Maintains state for filters loading error selection editing and modal

Name: fetchFilters API Loader
Purpose: Load and normalize filters from backend
High Level Logic: Calls API maps response fields parses JSON fields sorts by position

Name: saveFilter API Handler
Purpose: Create or update filter payload in backend
High Level Logic: Builds payload stringifies JSON fields posts to api.php then refreshes list

Name: deleteFilter API Handler
High Level Logic: Posts ID to delete_filter.php and refreshes list on success

Name: duplicateFilter Handler
High Level Logic: Copies filter strips ID/timestamps adjusts name and position then saves as new

Name: Header Action Bar
Input: Refresh click + Create New Filter click
High Level Logic: Triggers fetchFilters or opens modal in create mode
Output: Data refresh or create modal open

Name: Filter List Section
High Level Logic: Iterates filters renders each card with status badges and actions

Name: Filter List Item Card
Purpose: Represent one filter summary and actions
High Level Logic: Renders checkbox metadata badges fields timestamps and action buttons

Name: Multi Select Checkbox
High Level Logic: Adds/removes filter ID from selectedFilters array

Name: Edit Action
High Level Logic: Sets editingFilter and opens modal

Name: Duplicate Action
High Level Logic: Calls duplicateFilter helper then save flow

Name: Delete Action
Input: Clicked filter card delete icon + confirmation
High Level Logic: Calls deleteFilter handler and backend delete API

Name: Summary Panel
High Level Logic: Computes total active and API-linked counts

Name: Quick Actions Panel
High Level Logic: Sets selectedFilters to all IDs or empty

Name: Create/Edit Modal Shell
High Level Logic: Renders overlay/backdrop with close behavior and embeds BasicTab

Name: ThemeProvider Wrapper
Purpose: Provide light/dark theme context in editor
High Level Logic: Applies theme class and exposes toggleTheme via context

Name: BasicTab Editor
Input: Current filter data edit mode callbacks
High Level Logic: Renders tabbed editor validates fields handles save/cancel callbacks

Name: Tab Navigation
High Level Logic: Controls activeTab among basic styling events validation options queryBuilder

Name: Basic Tab Content
Purpose: Configure core filter identity and behavior
Input: Name type field default required visible etc
High Level Logic: Updates local form state with standard properties

Name: Styling Tab Content
Purpose: Configure visual styles for filter UI
High Level Logic: Validates style fields and stores in state

Name: Events Tab Content
High Level Logic: Saves onClick/onBlur/onChange/onFocus/onKeyDown/onKeyUp metadata

Name: Validation Tab Content
High Level Logic: Applies validation constraints into form state

Name: Options Tab Content
Input: Static options or API option settings
High Level Logic: Stores options list multiselect custom flags webapi type

Name: QueryBuilder Tab Content
Purpose: Build advanced query logic for dynamic filters
Input: Table selections joins where conditions window functions
High Level Logic: Generates queryBuilder structure and preview SQL logic

Name: Join Configuration Accordion
Input: Primary table/alias/column secondary table/alias/column join type
High Level Logic: Constructs join condition and selectable output columns

Name: Where Conditions Accordion
High Level Logic: Builds structured where conditions with logical operators

Name: Window Functions Accordion
High Level Logic: Builds window function SQL fragments for query output

Name: NestedQueryBuilder
Input: Nested query objects and table field lists
High Level Logic: Recursively edits nested query blocks and filter clauses

Name: UI Helper IconButton
High Level Logic: Renders consistent button styling variants and sizes

Name: UI Helper Badge
High Level Logic: Renders compact metadata labels

Name: DashboardManager Page
High Level Logic: Routes selected menu state to DashboardManager component

Name: Top Navigation Hook
Purpose: Connect menu selection to page rendering
High Level Logic: Checks selectedMenu equals DashboardManager then renders component

Name: DashboardManager Main Container
Purpose: Manage dashboards widgets data sources filters and context menus
High Level Logic: Maintains full manager state and tab-controlled views

Name: Header Actions Bar
Purpose: Expose create toggle tabs and refresh actions
Input: Button clicks and selected tab state
High Level Logic: Switches activeTab toggles drag mode triggers refresh and create flow

Name: Dashboards Tab
Purpose: Manage dashboard cards and selected dashboard canvas
High Level Logic: Shows cards and selected dashboard details with widget grid

Name: DashboardCard
High Level Logic: Renders title/description/type and edit/delete with drop target behavior

Name: Selected Dashboard Panel
Purpose: Show selected dashboard controls and widgets
High Level Logic: Renders dashboard details action buttons and grid layout area

Name: GridLayout Widget Canvas
Input: Widget layout x y w h data
High Level Logic: Uses react-grid-layout for drag resize and layout updates

Name: WidgetComponent Renderer
Purpose: Render each widget by visual type
High Level Logic: Branches rendering logic by KPI CHART TABLE TEXT MAP and defaults

Name: KPIView
High Level Logic: Renders value unit trend direction and description

Name: Chart Renderer Block
Purpose: Render chart-like bars from normalized data
High Level Logic: Calculates bar heights and labels using normalized data

Name: Table Renderer Block
High Level Logic: Builds simple table with header and row cells

Name: Text Renderer Block
Input: Text from normalized payload or config
High Level Logic: Displays text content with fallback message

Name: Map Renderer Block
High Level Logic: Dynamically loads leaflet components and plots valid lat/lng markers

Name: Recursive Context Menu
High Level Logic: Builds parent-child menu tree and recursive submenu UI

Name: Widgets Tab
Purpose: List and maintain widgets across dashboards
High Level Logic: Shows table of widgets with edit/delete and refresh/add actions

Name: Data Sources Tab
High Level Logic: Shows datasource table and opens CRUD modal actions

Name: Create Context Menu Tab
Purpose: Maintain context menu definitions and assignments
High Level Logic: Renders ContextMenuTab component for CRUD and mapping

Name: Assign Filters Tab
High Level Logic: Renders AssignFiltersTab and saves mapping selections

Name: Dashboard Modal
High Level Logic: Validates and posts/puts dashboard payload then refreshes list

Name: Widget Modal
Input: Widget form visual settings data source position
High Level Logic: Builds widget payload previews datasource output and saves

Name: Data Source Modal
Input: Datasource form endpoint method cache JSON blocks
High Level Logic: Validates JSON fields and source-type requirements then saves

Name: fetchWidgetData Pipeline
Purpose: Load live data for widget rendering
Input: Widget datasource id and datasource config
High Level Logic: Routes API/SQL/STATIC fetching then normalizes response and stores state

Name: loadDashboards Pipeline
Purpose: Load dashboard list and preserve selection
High Level Logic: Fetches dashboards and keeps/repairs selected dashboard state

Name: loadWidgets Pipeline
High Level Logic: Fetches widgets and maps to grid layout coordinates

Name: loadDataSources Pipeline
High Level Logic: Fetches datasource records and stores in state

Name: Filter Assignment Pipeline
High Level Logic: Fetches filters and mappings and toggles assignment with save API calls

Name: Refresh Dashboard Manager
High Level Logic: Calls parallel loaders dashboards datasources filters mappings and current widgets

Name: Root Main Workspace Page
Purpose: Provide unified shell with menu-driven page switching
High Level Logic: Maintains selectedMenu state and conditionally mounts all linked feature pages

Name: Menu Sidebar with Nested Sections
Purpose: Offer hierarchical navigation for modules and submenus
Input: Menu clicks and expand collapse actions
High Level Logic: Tracks expanded menu groups and updates selected menu state

Name: Top Header and Right Panel Controls
Purpose: Provide global actions and contextual side panel
Input: Settings click logo click and right-panel toggle
High Level Logic: Shows header controls and opens or closes sliding right panel with persisted UI state
Output: Global utility controls available across content

Name: Form Workflow Content Table
Purpose: Document and filter form workflow records
Input: Search text and sample form metadata rows
High Level Logic: Filters local dataset by id name owner and renders status-tagged table

Name: Dashboard Drag Resize Content
Purpose: Enable interactive dashboard card positioning and resize
Input: Card drag events resize handles and selection state
High Level Logic: Constrains cards within container updates dimensions and position in state

High Level Logic: Opens nested context menus toggles stacked views and renders drill-across table panel

Purpose: Provide grid-based dashboard panels with drag support

Output: Logs module placeholder ready for expansion

Name: Theme and Multi-Context Analytics Page
Purpose: Manage multi-scope filtering panel controls and chart workbench
Input: Global page panel filters tab switches and chart context menus
High Level Logic: Applies global page and panel filters supports cross-filtering drag reorder maximize modal and drill interactions

Name: Filter Sidebar Tabs
Purpose: Separate filter operations into filter history and generate areas
Input: Tab selection and refresh actions for cross global and individual filters
High Level Logic: Maintains scoped filter states and provides reset actions for each filter domain

Name: Maximize Modal with Drag Resize
Purpose: Allow focused analysis in movable resizable modal
Input: Panel maximize action and modal resize drag interactions
High Level Logic: Renders portal modal with draggable header and directional resize handles
